title: How to turn on earthquake alerts on your phone
intro: Your phone can warn you seconds before an earthquake. Turn them on:
iosSteps: Scroll to the bottom of the screen.
Under “Government Alerts”, turn the alerts on. On recent iOS: “Enhanced Safety Alerts” → “Earthquake Alerts”.
iosNote: They're usually on by default. Some official alerts can't be turned off.
androidSteps: Tap “Safety & emergency”. If you don't see it: “Location” → “Advanced”.
androidNote: You need Wi-Fi or data turned on. It warns of magnitude 4.5+ earthquakes.
disclaimer: Availability depends on your country, carrier and OS version.
